review_criteria: Verify the breach packet explicitly details the incident (the execution of M6-B, M6-C, and V0.7 Retrospective without human authorization following the M6-A circuit breaker recovery).
Verify the packet explicitly scopes the unauthorized execution window, listing the affected artifacts.
Verify the packet confirms that the L2/L3 Physical Gating Protocol was nonetheless maintained (no Gatekeeper bypass, no source code contamination).
Verify the packet provides the Human Coordinator with explicit Remediation & Ratification Options (Option A: Formal Ratification, Option B: Hard Rollback).
Verify NO implementation files, workflow semantics, or directories are modified by this document.
